title: 烏克蘭朋友提議，將「光復香港時代革命」變成義士之間打招呼用語

replies.msg:
呢個post係我係721前出
除左元朗恐襲
大家仲記唔記得當日呢八個字
仲記唔記得係中聯辦門口既激戰

9個月後而家證明左我地係做得非常岩
而家已經係一國一制
中聯辦就係一切邪惡既核心

冇錯，我地武力而家係唔夠佢揪
但係我地係呢一刻呢一秒仲生存緊
個果八個字仲係個心度

當年六四中國人對抗共產黨
就係因為有心既人死哂走哂
先會變成而家既支那種

所以
無論做乜野都好
無論你有幾黃
無論我地平時點樣互屌
其實大家心入面都係為左呢八個字做人

奪權唔容易
改變歷史唔容易
但係呢個係我地呢代人命中注定要做既事
加多個打招待手勢

雖然烏克蘭右派同納粹既關係好似都好複雜，未打仗之前好似係友好，打過嚟之後當德國係解放者，點知德國將全體斯拉夫人當狗，去到德國開始輸先至起用返烏克蘭右派對抗蘇聯，去到今日烏克蘭右派依然有同德國極右既NPD有交流，但難以否認既係德國納粹當烏克蘭人只係condom 或者可能都有有意激鳩俄羅斯既意圖，因為俄羅斯自認為繼承咗蘇聯，包括衛國戰爭、反法西斯既光榮，都係屬於佢，所以烏克蘭右派想同俄羅斯企喺對立面

係咪會效果好d

話說最近上啲交友網都有烏克蘭人message我:

...Just want you to know that i personally also support Hong Kong protests!
I mean i maybe don't participate in it, but "morally" i support Hongkongers because it reminds me our Maidan in 2013th.
...And i posted on my Facebook photos with Hong Kongers with papers saying "thank you" to the whole world in different languages, including Ukrainian. You know what in my opinion is similar between us. That in both situation it is a question what will be in future. In Ukraine it was a place where the future of Europe was under the question, in Hong Kong i dare say it is a question of the future of the World because it shows us the aggression of Beijing's regime and if this regime will win, it will cause a big damage to world's freedom and may push the world towards the path of tyranny. First victim was Tibet, second Uighurs in camps, today it is time of Hong Kong unfortunately and i realise that after Hong Kong it will be somebody's else time.
It is quite disappointing that this "world society" is still quiet despite that these protests last for already 1 year!!!
One my friend told me that when Hong Kongers saw the video of the funeral of "Nebesna sotnya" ("Heavenly Hundred") they didn't know the words of the song but they also started crying like our people during the events. I don't know if you heard that song.

I know a little bit about Hong Kong. Hope that it will withstand and keep its Independence and Freedom from Beijing.

When we were protesting our army was ruined and the majority of the authorities were russian puppets. They later fled to Russia and the war has started.
by the way, the idea with lasers lighting on security cameras is great idea of counter-measures.

另外識個烏克蘭妹好愛國，即係好積極支持當年基輔示威嗰種
不過最近佢竟然同我講話武漢肺炎係唔存在，所謂疫症係偽造出嚟
戇鳩到我唔知點答佢
